history.text: Mauretania appears in Morocco's historical record.

Almohad Dynasty ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Marinid Dynasty ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Wattasid Dynasty ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Saadi Dynasty ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Alawi Dynasty (current dynasty) ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
